messages.message: Bro chose violence.
You kill my wife!!.
now its our wife
LMAOOO
thats my brudah, kil him
Anyone see my kid?
99% of citizens quit before winning
thats my landlord, no charges pressed
IM CALLING THE POLICE ON YOU
respawn timer for humans when
well thats one less custody battle
thats literally my ex, NICE
perfect timing for the life insurance payout
im supposed to be in witness protection
he stole my nuggets, justice served
finally free from my mother in law
bro didnt even flex before dying, weak
the tax collector got what he deserved
thats the guy who steals my wifi
guess i dont have jury duty anymore
that was my date from last night LMAO
FINALLY the HOA president is gone
thats my sub teacher, no homework today
he sold me a lemon, REVENGE
he crashed my wedding once, deserved
he gave me a ticket yesterday, KARMA
im literally unemployed now thanks to him
ive been preparing for this my whole life
we do bulk discounts now, call us
im gonna be SO busy this week
betting pool is at 47 now, place your bets
this is GREAT for my sales numbers
i was literally about to testify against him
my ex husband just got served, literally
the bill collector finally stopped calling
he was jaywalking anyway tbh
RIP to my mailman, no more late packages tho
she gossiped about my divorce, KARMA FAST
that cop gave me 3 tickets this month
my dentist appointment just got cancelled forever
he never tipped, this is restaurant karma
FINALLY some peace and quiet
he tried to sell me essential oils, deserved
walked too slow on the sidewalk, fate sealed
he scammed me in crypto, this is justice
he never wipes down the machines, KARMA
got my order wrong 3 times, NO MERCY
complained about my pool party once, bye
never picked up his dogs poo, deserved this
ghosted me after taking the deposit, REVENGE
1 star review incoming, oh wait hes dead
he rated me 1 star for no reason
never did his part of the project, justice
called me 47 times about my car warranty
didnt show up to my party, this is fair
never washed his dishes, finally avenged
cheated the carpool lane, road karma
phone rang during the movie, unforgivable
blocked the whole aisle with his cart, deserved
mashed all the buttons in the elevator once
chewed so loud at the office, finally silent
wouldnt share his wifi password, KARMA
replied all on a 500 person email chain
microwaved fish in the office breakroom, deserved
karaoke at 3am every night, this is justice
owes me 50 bucks, guess thats gone now
ran every red light in town, road justice
kept changing the thermostat, finally over
typed so loud on mechanical keyboard, peace now
took 20 minutes at self checkout, deserved fr
double parked and blocked my car, justice served
took loud phone calls on speaker on the train
stole my recycling bin once, finally avenged
didnt bring a gift to my baby shower
came to the potluck empty handed every time
ate ALL the free samples at costco, justice
mowed his lawn at 6am every saturday, KARMA
stole packages off my porch, finally caught
couldnt parallel park to save his life, fitting
vaped so much in the elevator, no more
returned worn clothes to the store, deserved
made every meeting run 30 minutes over
claimed his cat was a service animal once
never refilled the office coffee pot, justice
texted while driving constantly, road karma
late to every single meeting, finally on time now
stole my lunch from the office fridge, REVENGE
talked through the entire movie, theater justice
played music without headphones on the bus
never returned his shopping cart, chaotic neutral
interrupted everyone in every conversation ever
left passive aggressive office notes constantly
hogged the armrest on the whole flight
never tipped the barista once in his life
slammed doors so loud the building shook
overshared his whole life on facebook, no more
called everyone a pet name uninvited, weird guy
forwarded chain messages to the whole family group chat
never washed his hands, hygiene karma
took credit for the whole groups work, justice
kept everyone on speakerphone in public, deserved
ate other peoples labeled lunches in the office fridge
played candy crush at full volume in public
reclined his seat all the way back during meal time
never used his turn signal once, road justice
watched youtube videos loud at the gym, finally quiet
clipped his nails on the subway, unforgivable
asked for a discount on EVERYTHING, every time
took the last slice without asking, the audacity
never flushed the public toilet, hygiene tribunal approved
snoozed his alarm 10 times every morning, finally rested
